name: Tupac Shakur
title: Tupac Shakur - taken 9/13/96 died minutes later on 9/13/96, 25
description: Tupac Shakur - taken 9/13/96 died minutes later on 9/13/96, 25
bio: Tupac Shakur was an American rapper, actor, and activist considered one of the most influential hip-hop artists of all time. His music addressed social issues including racism, poverty, and violence in inner cities.
